quotes.quote: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: Wise men speak because they have something to say; Fools because they have to say something.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Victorious warriors win first and then go to war, while defeated warriors go to war first and then seek to win.
quotes.author: Sun Tzu

quotes.quote: There is nothing outside of yourself that can ever enable you to get better, stronger, richer, quicker, or smarter. Everything is within.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.quote: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: Talent hits a target no one else can hit; Genius hits a target no one else can see.
quotes.author: Arthur Schopenhauer

quotes.quote: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
quotes.author: Søren Kierkegaard

quotes.quote: The lion cannot protect himself from traps, and the fox cannot defend himself from wolves. One must therefore be a fox to recognize traps, and a lion to frighten wolves.
quotes.author: Niccolò Machiavelli

quotes.quote: Knowing your own darkness is the best method for dealing with the darknesses of other people.
quotes.author: Carl Jung

quotes.quote: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.
quotes.author: Viktor Frankl

quotes.quote: A wise man gets more use from his enemies than a fool from his friends.
quotes.author: Baltasar Gracián

quotes.quote: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams! Live the life you've imagined.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Death is nothing, but to live defeated and inglorious is to die daily.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.quote: Veni, vidi, vici. (I came, I saw, I conquered.)
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.quote: There is nothing impossible to him who will try.
quotes.author: Alexander the Great

quotes.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: A good plan violently executed now is better than a perfect plan executed next week.
quotes.author: George S. Patton

quotes.quote: Plans are nothing; planning is everything.
quotes.author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quotes.quote: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: What I cannot create, I do not understand.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.quote: If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants.
quotes.author: Isaac Newton

quotes.quote: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Absorb what is useful, discard what is useless and add what is specifically your own.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.quote: They don't know me son!
quotes.author: David Goggins

quotes.quote: Discipline equals freedom.
quotes.author: Jocko Willink

quotes.quote: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
quotes.author: James Clear

quotes.quote: Play iterated games. All the returns in life, whether in wealth, relationships, or knowledge, come from compound interest.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.quote: Benefits are merely an illusion, only strength is true.
quotes.author: Fang Yuan

quotes.quote: I am Limitless.
quotes.author: Limitless Demon Venerable

quotes.quote: Kill! Kill! Kill!
quotes.author: Spectral Soul Demon Venerable

quotes.quote: Regret is the poison of life.
quotes.author: Red Lotus Demon Venerable

quotes.quote: The path to paradise is fraught with suffering.
quotes.author: Paradise Earth Immortal Venerable

quotes.quote: Luck is simply another form of strength.
quotes.author: Giant Sun Immortal Venerable

quotes.quote: The stars hold the answers, but one must know how to ask.
quotes.author: Star Constellation Immortal Venerable

quotes.quote: We are guardians, but also a bunch of miserable wretches that are constantly fighting against threats and madness.
quotes.author: Klein Moretti

quotes.quote: A monocle is a gentleman's romance.
quotes.author: Amon

quotes.quote: I don't pay for suits. My suits are on the house or the house burns down.
quotes.author: Thomas Shelby

quotes.quote: I am Iron Man.
quotes.author: Tony Stark

quotes.quote: It's not who I am underneath, but what I do that defines me.
quotes.author: Batman

quotes.quote: Why do we fall, sir? So that we can learn to pick ourselves up.
quotes.author: Alfred Pennyworth

quotes.quote: When you have eliminated the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth.
quotes.author: Sherlock Holmes

quotes.quote: Sometimes life is like this dark tunnel. You can't always see the light at the end of the tunnel, but if you just keep moving you will come to a better place.
quotes.author: Uncle Iroh

quotes.quote: I will take a potato chip... and eat it!
quotes.author: Light Yagami

quotes.quote: Justice will prevail no matter what.
quotes.author: L Lawliet

quotes.quote: The only ones who should kill are those who are prepared to be killed.
quotes.author: Lelouch Lamperouge

quotes.quote: There is nothing special about being born. Not a thing.
quotes.author: Johan Liebert

quotes.quote: All people are nothing but tools. It doesn't matter how it's done. It doesn't matter what needs to be sacrificed. In this world, winning is everything.
quotes.author: Ayanokoji Kiyotaka

quotes.quote: Throughout Heaven and Earth, I alone am the honored one.
quotes.author: Gojo Satoru

quotes.quote: People's lives don't end when they die. It ends when they lose faith.
quotes.author: Itachi Uchiha

quotes.quote: Wake up to reality! Nothing ever goes as planned in this world.
quotes.author: Madara Uchiha

quotes.quote: Those who do not understand true pain can never understand true peace.
quotes.author: Pain (Nagato)

quotes.quote: I'm in hell.
quotes.author: Obito Uchiha

quotes.quote: The only thing we're allowed to do is believe that we won't regret the choice we made.
quotes.author: Levi Ackerman

quotes.quote: My soldiers, rage! My soldiers, scream! My soldiers, fight!
quotes.author: Erwin Smith

quotes.quote: If you win, you live. If you lose, you die. If you don't fight, you can't win!
quotes.author: Eren Yeager

quotes.quote: I have no enemies.
quotes.author: Thorfinn

quotes.quote: You don't have any enemies. No one has any enemies. There's no one in the world that you should hurt.
quotes.author: Askeladd

quotes.quote: He died doing whatever the hell he wanted. No matter what, right up until the very end.
quotes.author: Guts

quotes.quote: The weak do not have the right to choose how they die.
quotes.author: Baki Hanma

quotes.quote: True power is the ability to mold the world to your will.
quotes.author: Yujiro Hanma

quotes.quote: Fear is the ultimate weapon.
quotes.author: Gun Park

quotes.quote: Genius is a curse.
quotes.author: James Lee

quotes.quote: Wealth is the only truth.
quotes.author: Charles Choi

quotes.quote: The old must pave the way for the new.
quotes.author: Elite

quotes.quote: Violence solves everything.
quotes.author: Tom Lee

quotes.quote: Madness is just another perspective.
quotes.author: Jinyoung Park

quotes.quote: To protect my family, I will become a monster.
quotes.author: Gapryong Kim

quotes.quote: A leader must bear the weight of his crew.
quotes.author: Jake Kim

quotes.quote: I will stand at the pinnacle.
quotes.author: Samuel Seo

quotes.quote: Sight may be lost, but vision remains.
quotes.author: Johan Seong

quotes.quote: Family is everything.
quotes.author: Eli Jang

quotes.quote: Two bodies, one soul.
quotes.author: Daniel Park

quotes.quote: Justice will be served with my fists.
quotes.author: Vasco

quotes.quote: I will never lose again.
quotes.author: Zack Lee

quotes.quote: Idols are made, legends are born.
quotes.author: DG

quotes.quote: Friends are more important than money.
quotes.author: Yuichi Katagiri

quotes.quote: Those who break the rules are scum, that's true, but those who abandon their friends are worse than scum.
quotes.author: Kakashi Hatake

quotes.quote: I want everyone in the village to acknowledge me and become a great Hokage!
quotes.author: Minato Namikaze

quotes.quote: What a drag.
quotes.author: Shikamaru Nara

quotes.quote: The spring time of youth has yet to fade away!
quotes.author: Might Guy

quotes.quote: Are you the strongest because you're Gojo Satoru, or are you Gojo Satoru because you're the strongest?
quotes.author: Suguru Geto

quotes.quote: I am the one who left it all behind.
quotes.author: Toji Fushiguro

quotes.quote: Arise.
quotes.author: Sung Jin-Woo

quotes.quote: Nothing happened.
quotes.author: Roronoa Zoro

quotes.quote: You want to protect something? Then do it with your life on the line!
quotes.author: Dracule Mihawk

quotes.quote: Maybe nothing in this world happens by accident.
quotes.author: Silvers Rayleigh

quotes.quote: Inherited Will, The Destiny of the Age, and The Dreams of the People.
quotes.author: Gol D. Roger

quotes.quote: One Piece is real!
quotes.author: Whitebeard

quotes.quote: The path to mastery is a lonely one.
quotes.author: Yorichii Tsugikuni
